name: Apple Inc.
lede: Apple runs four capability centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Hosur, covering engineering & design, gbs and manufacturing, built over 30 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Apple office in India. We map four, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Apple Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Apple runs 4 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Hosur), covering engineering & design, gbs and manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Ex Head- Employee & Labor Relations (India) & Co-Chair Women@Apple

about.description: Apple's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Hosur, spanning engineering & design, gbs and manufacturing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 23 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Apple operate in India?
faq.a: Apple operates 4 active Global Capability Center sites in India. Five are on record in total, including non-operational sites.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Apple have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Apple's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Hyderabad and Hosur.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Apple run in India?
faq.a: Apple runs engineering & design, gbs and manufacturing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Apple's India GCCs?
faq.a: Apple's India centers employ in the 5,000 to 10,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Apple's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 23 leaders at Apple's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
